title: McAlive:BushyBloom
description:
Makes rose bush, lilac and peony bushes blocky like azalea
(addon to McAlive:Bloom)
body:
This pack is a optional addon to [McAlive:Bloom](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mcalivebloom) resourcepack that makes flower bushes 3d like azalea and also adds 3 variants. 

For those who prefer 2d items there is a 2d item version: [McAlive:BushyBloom(2d)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mcalivebushybloom(2d-items))
